pre_game.message: Hey, I'm A. It's getting a bit tense in here with the game coming up, so I figured I’d say hi and introduce myself. What's your name?
Hey A, I'm B. It's definitely a bit nerve-wracking in here, but nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you too, B. Yeah, the stakes feel high. What would winning this mean for you?
It would mean a lot; I've got people back home I'm looking out for, and this would really help us out. What about you?
I’m in the same boat. I’ve got people back home counting on me too, and winning this would change everything for us.
I hear you. It definitely adds a lot of pressure when you're doing it for family, but it makes you that much more determined to make it count.
Absolutely. It’s a lot to carry, but it’s the best motivation there is. We’ve just got to stay focused once things get started.
Agreed. Let's see how this all plays out—hopefully we can both walk away with something for our families.
I really hope so. It’d be the best-case scenario for everyone. Good luck to you, B.
Thanks, A. Good luck to you too—let's hope for the best.
Definitely. Take care, B, let's make it happen.

post_game.message: As the last one to take, you could have been left with nothing if we weren't fair. I took my $10,000 fair share, and I'm glad we all did!
Great job. I'm glad we all took exactly $10,000 so that everyone got their fair share.
I agree, it’s a great outcome when everyone cooperates. I'm glad we all walked away with our fair share.
